debug.name: Debug mode
debug.hint: Client-side setting enabling extended debug logging.

groups.name: Group data
groups.hint: Internal storage for all configured groups. Managed automatically — do not edit manually.

gatherSpeed.name: "Get Over Here" movement speed
gatherSpeed.hint: Controls how fast member tokens walk toward the leader when using "Get Over Here".

getInPositionRadius.name: "Get in Position" spread radius (grid squares)
getInPositionRadius.hint: Maximum spread distance in grid squares from the leader. Always counted in squares — the scene's distance unit (feet, meters, etc.) does not affect this value.

audioFile4GetOverHere.name: "Get Over Here" audio
audioFile4GetOverHere.hint: Sound played for all clients when "Get Over Here" is used.

audioFile4GetInPosition.name: "Get in Position" audio
audioFile4GetInPosition.hint: Sound played for all clients when "Get in Position" is used.

audioFile4LoadFormation.name: "Load Formation" audio
audioFile4LoadFormation.hint: Sound played for all clients when "Load Formation" is used.

audioFile4Crunch.name: Audio file on "Group"
audioFile4Crunch.hint: Audio file (relative path) to be played when grouping.

audioFile4Explode.name: Audio file on "Ungroup"
audioFile4Explode.hint: Audio file (relative path) to be played when ungrouping.

hudActorTypeFilter.name: Token HUD actor type filter
hudActorTypeFilter.hint: List of actor types for which the Token HUD button is hidden.

errMsg.invalidTokenCount: Required: exactly ONE group token and MORE THAN ONE member tokens
errMsg.groupAndMembersIntersect: A token cannot appear both as a member and as the group token.
errMsg.invalidNumberOfMemberTokens: Invalid number of tokens selected. A group must consist of 2 to 25 members.
errMsg.notUniqueInScene: is not unique in the scene!
errMsg.membersAndPartyAllHidden: None of the involved tokens are currently visible.
errMsg.pleaseWaitStillBusy: Please wait for the current action to complete ...
errMsg.pleaseSelectToken: Please select at least one scene token to use this function.
errMsg.movementActionNotFound: Unable to move token: the following movement action was not found in CONFIG.Token.movement.actions:
errMsg.pleaseReportThisError: Please report this error to the module author.
errMsg.pleaseActivateTokenLayer: Please activate the token layer (top-left menu) to use this function.
errMsg.noGroupOnCurrentScene: No configured group exists on the current scene.
errMsg.selectAtLeastTwoTokens: Select at least 2 tokens before grouping.
errMsg.tokenNotFoundOnScene: Token not found on current scene.

contextMenu.multiSelectHint: {count} tokens selected — click Create to form a new group.
contextMenu.multiSelectSubHint: Pick one of the selected tokens as leader (no external token needed), or any other token for classic mode.
contextMenu.noGroupHint: not part of any configured group. Select 2+ tokens to create a group.
contextMenu.notInAnyGroup: "{tokenNames}" not found in any configured group.

partyPrompt.label: Choose the group token:
partyPrompt.hint: Pick one of the selected tokens to be the group leader.

group-tokens.promptForPartyTokenNameText: Choose the token that will represent the group when collapsed.
group-tokens.groupingConfirmation: The following tokens have been assigned to group #{partyNo} [token: {partyTokenName}]
